overview.description: The iShares 1-10 Year Treasury Bond ETF (GOVM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the ICE U.S. Treasury 1-10 Year Bond index. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of US Treasurys with a remaining maturity between 1-10 years. GOVM was launched on May 12, 2026 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: ICE U.S. Treasury 1-10 Year Bond Index
